items.title: Duchies of Lancaster and Cornwall (Accounts) Act 1838
items.description: An Act to revive and continue an Act of the First and Second Years of His late Majesty, to enable His Majesty to make Leases, Copies, and Grants of Offices, Lands, and Hereditaments Parcel of the Duchy of Cornwall or annexed to the same ; and to make Provision for rendering to Parliament annual Accounts of the Receipts and Disbursement of the Duchies of Cornwall and Lancaster.

items.title: Pluralities Act 1838
items.description: An Act to abridge the holding of Benefices in Plurality, and to make better Provision for the Residence of the Clergy.

items.title: Judgments Act 1838
items.description: An Act for abolishing Arrest on Mesne Process in Civil Actions, except in certain Cases; for extending the Remedies of Creditors against the Property of Debtors; and for amending the Laws for the Relief of Insolvent Debtors in England.

items.title: Debtors (Scotland) Act 1838
items.description: An Act to amend the Law of Scotland in Matters relating to Personal Diligence, Arrestments, and Poindings.

items.title: Court of Session (No. 2) Act 1838 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to make certain Alterations in the Duties of the Lords Ordinary, and in the Establishment of Clerks and Officers of the Court of Session and Court of Commissioners for Teinds in Scotland, and to reduce the Fees payable in those Courts.

items.title: Queen Anne’s Bounty Act 1838 (repealed)
items.description: An Act for the Consolidation of the Offices of First Fruits, Tenths, and Queen Anne's Bounty.

items.title: Parsonages Act 1838 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to amend the Law for providing fit Houses for the beneficed Clergy.

items.title: Dean Forest (Mines) Act 1838
items.description: An Act for regulating the opening and working of Mines and Quarries in the Forest of Dean and Hundred of Saint Briavels in the County of Gloucester.

items.title: Tithe Act 1838 (repealed 19.11.1998)
items.description: An Act to facilitate the Merger of Tithes in Land.

items.title: Entail Act 1838 (repealed)
items.description: An Act to extend the Powers of an Act of the Sixth and Seventh Year of the Reign of His late Majesty, in relation to granting Tacks and making Excambions by Heirs of Entail.

items.title: Drouly Fund Act 1838 (repealed)
items.description: An Act respecting the Transfer of certain Funds to the Secretary at War and the Paymaster General.
